text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Age Peer Networking * Mental Health Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Mental Health Issues Older Adults Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Young Adults in Transition (YAT) provides support services for young adults who suffer from mental health or behavioral challenges. YAT Teams establish relationships with young adults, families and peers, and all available support systems. Transitional treatment and intervention help young adults graduate school, continue education, find employment, maintain friendships, and gain independence. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Ages 14-24 who are involved with the juvenile justice system, Department of Human Services currently homeless, or live in a foster home. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 213-6851 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION
